```{r}
      filter(label != "reg_sd") |>  # Remove rows where the label matches the old variable name
      mutate(stat_1 = if_else(row_number() == n(), stat_1, gsub("\\(.*", "", stat_1)),
             stat_2 = if_else(row_number() == n(), stat_2, gsub("\\(.*", "", stat_2)),
             stat_3 = if_else(row_number() == n(), stat_3, gsub("\\(.*", "", stat_3)),
             )
  )

dmode_crosstab_tb

dmode_crosstab_tb |>
  as_flex_table() |>
  flextable::save_as_docx(path = "../outputs/figures/supplement/supplementary_table_1.docx")

```

### Supplementary Table 2

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| include: false
#| warning: false


# rf vars for violin plots
explanatory_vars <- c(
                  "d_dmode",
                  #     "d_age_menarche_lab",
                  # "d_ocstatus2_lab",
                  # "d_parity_lab",
                  # "d_agebirth1_lab",
                  # "d_bf_dur_lab",
                  # "d_R1menopause_lab3",
                  # "d_age_menopause_lab", 
                  # "d_R1hrtstatus_lab",
                  # "d_bbd_lab",
                  # "d_fambrca_lab",
                  # "d_bmi_20_lab",
                  # "d_bmi_entry_lab",
                  # "d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab",
                  # "d_R1alcohol_units_lab",
                  # "d_R1smokingstatus_lab",
                        
                 "d_inv_status", 
                 "d_grade_lab", 
                 "d_morph4_lab", 
                 "d_pos_nodes_lab", 
                 "d_tumour_size_lab", 
                 "d_er_status_lab", 
                 "d_pr_status_lab", 
                 "d_her2_status_lab"
                        
                      )


# Summary
table_summary <- df_compl_case |>
  mutate(d_bmi_entry_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_entry_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+"),
        d_bmi_20_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_20_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+")
              ) |>
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
   mutate(d_bf_dur_lab = if_else(d_bf_dur_lab == "Missing", NA, d_bf_dur_lab),
         d_age_menopause_lab = if_else(d_age_menopause_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_age_menopause_lab),
         d_R1hrtstatus_lab = if_else(d_R1hrtstatus_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_R1hrtstatus_lab),
         d_agebirth1_lab = if_else(d_agebirth1_lab == "Non-parous", NA, d_agebirth1_lab),
         d_dmode = factor(d_dmode, levels = c("SD", "I"))
         ) |> 
  select(any_of(explanatory_vars)
         ) |> 
    tbl_summary(
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                all_categorical() ~ "{n}"
                ),
              digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,
              # type = list(d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "categorical",
              #             d_fambrca_lab ~ "categorical",
              #             d_bbd_lab ~ "categorical"),
              missing = "no"
    ) |>
    modify_table_body(
      ~ filter(.x, stat_0 != 0 | is.na(stat_0))
    )

# Summary of mammographic
table_summary_md <- df_compl_case |>
  mutate(d_bmi_entry_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_entry_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+"),
        d_bmi_20_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_20_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+") 
              ) |>
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
   mutate(d_bf_dur_lab = if_else(d_bf_dur_lab == "Missing", NA, d_bf_dur_lab),
         d_age_menopause_lab = if_else(d_age_menopause_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_age_menopause_lab),
         d_R1hrtstatus_lab = if_else(d_R1hrtstatus_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_R1hrtstatus_lab),
         d_agebirth1_lab = if_else(d_agebirth1_lab == "Non-parous", NA, d_agebirth1_lab),
         d_dmode = factor(d_dmode, levels = c("SD", "I"))
         ) |> 
  select(any_of(explanatory_vars), d_md
         ) |> 
    tbl_custom_summary(
              statistic = list(
                everything() ~ "{mean} ({sd})"
                ),
              stat_fns  = list(
                everything() ~ function(data, full_data, variable, by, type, ...){
                  dplyr::summarize(data, mean = mean(d_md),
                           sd = sd(d_md))
                }
              ),
              digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,
              # type = list(d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "categorical",
              #             d_fambrca_lab ~ "categorical",
              #             d_bbd_lab ~ "categorical"),
              missing = "no"
    ) |>
    modify_table_body(
      ~ filter(.x, stat_0 != 0 | is.na(stat_0))
    )


# Unadjusted:
table_unadjusted <- df_compl_case |> 
  filter(d_md_avail == 1
  ) |> 
  mutate(d_bf_dur_lab = if_else(d_bf_dur_lab == "Missing", NA, d_bf_dur_lab),
         d_age_menopause_lab = if_else(d_age_menopause_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_age_menopause_lab),
         d_R1hrtstatus_lab = if_else(d_R1hrtstatus_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_R1hrtstatus_lab),
         d_agebirth1_lab = if_else(d_agebirth1_lab == "Non-parous", NA, d_agebirth1_lab),
         d_dmode = factor(d_dmode, levels = c("SD", "I"))
         ) |> 
  select(d_md, any_of(explanatory_vars)
         ) |> 
  tbl_uvregression(
    method = lm,
    y = d_md,
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun,
    estimate_fun = function(x){
      case_when(
        is.na(x) ~ NA,
        TRUE ~ formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 2)
      )
    },
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
    method.args = list(na.action = na.omit),
    hide_n = T
   ) |> 
  # modify_table_body(~ .x |>
  #   mutate(across(c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high), exp))
  # ) |>
  # modify_header(
  #   estimate = "**exp(Beta)**"
  # ) |>
  # add_global_p() |>  # add global p-value
  bold_labels() 


#table_unadjusted


# rf vars for violin plots
explanatory_vars <- c(
                  "d_dmode",
                  #     "d_age_menarche_lab",
                  # "d_ocstatus2_lab",
                  # "d_parity_lab",
                  # "d_agebirth1_lab",
                  # "d_bf_dur_lab",
                  # "d_R1menopause_lab3",
                  # "d_age_menopause_lab", 
                  # "d_R1hrtstatus_lab",
                  # "d_bbd_lab",
                  # "d_fambrca_lab",
                  # "d_bmi_20_lab",
                  # "d_bmi_entry_lab",
                  # "d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab",
                  # "d_R1alcohol_units_lab",
                  # "d_R1smokingstatus_lab",
                        
                 "d_inv_status", 
                 "d_grade_lab", 
                 "d_morph4_lab", 
                 "d_pos_nodes_lab", 
                 "d_tumour_size_lab", 
                 "d_er_status_lab", 
                 "d_pr_status_lab", 
                 "d_her2_status_lab"
                        
                      )


# Adjusted table
# List to store regression tables
table_list <- list()

# data manipulation to remove redundant levels 

df_temp <- df_compl_case |> 
  mutate(d_bf_dur_lab = if_else(d_bf_dur_lab == "Missing", NA, d_bf_dur_lab),
         d_age_menopause_lab = if_else(d_age_menopause_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_age_menopause_lab),
         d_R1hrtstatus_lab = if_else(d_R1hrtstatus_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_R1hrtstatus_lab),
         d_agebirth1_lab = if_else(d_agebirth1_lab == "Non-parous", NA, d_agebirth1_lab),
         d_age_mammo = AgeatEntry + d_R1toMD_y,
         d_dmode = factor(d_dmode, levels = c("SD", "I"))
         )


# Loop through each explanatory variable and create a regression table
for (var in explanatory_vars) {
  # Run the regression model adjusted for age
  model <- lm(as.formula(paste("d_md ~", var, "+ d_age_mammo")), data = df_temp, na.action = na.omit)

  # Create the regression table and store it in the list
  table_list[[var]] <- tbl_regression(
    model,
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun,
    estimate_fun = function(x){
      case_when(
        is.na(x) ~ NA,
        TRUE ~ formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 2)
      )
    }
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
  ) %>%
  # modify_table_body(~ .x |>
  #   mutate(across(c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high), exp))
  # ) |>
  # modify_header(
  #   estimate = "**exp(Beta)**"
  # ) |>
    # add_global_p(
    # ) |> 
    #add_n() |> # checked with unadjusted and n is the same so no need here
    remove_row_type(variables = "d_age_mammo", type = "all")  # Remove the age covariate from the table
}

# Stack all the regression tables into one
table_adjusted <- tbl_stack(table_list)

# View the final stacked table
table_adjusted

# Merge the tables

md_desc_table <- tbl_merge(list(table_summary, table_summary_md, table_unadjusted, table_adjusted),
                           tab_spanner = c(" ", "**Density**", "**Unadjusted**", "**Adjusted for age at mammogram**"
                                           )
                         )
                         
# Changing variable names to make sense
tab_labels <- c(
  "d_dmode" = "Mode of detection",
  # "d_age_menarche_lab" = "Age at menarche",
  # "d_ocstatus2_lab" = "Oral contraception status",
  # "d_parity_lab" = "Parity",
  # "d_agebirth1_lab" = "Age at first birth",
  # "d_bf_dur_lab" = "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
  # "d_R1menopause_lab3" = "Menopausal status",
  # "d_age_menopause_lab" = "Age at menopause",
  # "d_R1hrtstatus_lab" = "MHT status",
  # "d_bbd_lab" = "Benign breast disease",
  # "d_fambrca_lab" = "Family history of breast cancer",
  # "d_bmi_20_lab" = "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
  # "d_bmi_entry_lab" = "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
  # "d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab" = "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
  # "d_R1alcohol_units_lab" = "Alcohol units per week",
  # "d_R1smokingstatus_lab" = "Smoking status",
  "d_inv_status" = "Invasive status",
  "d_grade_lab" = "Grade",
  "d_morph4_lab" = "Morphology",
  "d_pos_nodes_lab" = "Node status",
  "d_tumour_size_lab" = "Tumour size (mm)",
  "d_er_status_lab" = "ER status",
  "d_pr_status_lab" = "PR status",
  "d_her2_status_lab" = "HER2 status"
)

for(i in 1:length(md_desc_table$table_body$label)){
  
  if(md_desc_table$table_body$label[[i]] %in% names(tab_labels)){
    
    md_desc_table$table_body$label[[i]] <- unname(tab_labels[which(names(tab_labels) == md_desc_table$table_body$label[[i]])])
    
  }
  
}

# Filter unneeded rows out
md_desc_table <- md_desc_table |>
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x |>
      filter(stat_0_1 != "0" | is.na(stat_0_1)) |>
      filter(stat_0_2 != "NA (NA)" | is.na(stat_0_2)) |>
      filter(variable != "d_md")
  )

# Manually changing the labels of levels in the table
md_desc_table$table_body$label[md_desc_table$table_body$label == "Mixed: ductal and other"] <- "Mixed"

md_desc_table$table_body$label[grepl(md_desc_table$table_body$label, pattern = "months")] <- gsub(" months", "", md_desc_table$table_body$label[grepl(md_desc_table$table_body$label, pattern = "months")])

md_desc_table$table_body$label[md_desc_table$table_body$label == "I"] <- "Interval"
md_desc_table$table_body$label[md_desc_table$table_body$label == "SD"] <- "Screen-Detected"

md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_bbd_labYes"] <- "Ever"
md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_bbd_labNo"] <- "Never"


md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_ocstatus2_labNo"] <- "Never"
md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_ocstatus2_labYes"] <- "Ever"

md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_inv_status1"] <- "Invasive"
md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_inv_status0"] <- "DCIS"





md_desc_table

wb <- wb_workbook()$add_worksheet("Supplementary_Table_2")
wb <- wb_add_flextable(wb, "Supplementary_Table_2", as_flex_table(md_desc_table))

```

### Supplementary Table 3

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| include: false
#| warning: false


# rf vars for violin plots
explanatory_vars <- c(
                  # "d_dmode",
                      "d_age_menarche_lab",
                  "d_ocstatus2_lab",
                  "d_parity_lab",
                  "d_agebirth1_lab",
                  "d_bf_dur_lab",
                  "d_R1menopause_lab3",
                  "d_age_menopause_lab", 
                  "d_R1hrtstatus_lab",
                  "d_bbd_lab",
                  "d_fambrca_lab",
                  "d_bmi_20_lab",
                  "d_bmi_entry_lab",
                  "d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab",
                  "d_R1alcohol_units_lab",
                  "d_R1smokingstatus_lab"
                        
                 # "d_inv_status", 
                 # "d_grade_lab", 
                 # "d_morph4_lab", 
                 # "d_pos_nodes_lab", 
                 # "d_tumour_size_lab", 
                 # "d_er_status_lab", 
                 # "d_pr_status_lab", 
                 # "d_her2_status_lab"
                        
                      )


# Summary
table_summary <- df_compl_case |>
  mutate(d_bmi_entry_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_entry_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+"),
        d_bmi_20_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_20_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+") 
              ) |>
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
   mutate(d_bf_dur_lab = if_else(d_bf_dur_lab == "Missing", NA, d_bf_dur_lab),
         d_age_menopause_lab = if_else(d_age_menopause_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_age_menopause_lab),
         d_R1hrtstatus_lab = if_else(d_R1hrtstatus_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_R1hrtstatus_lab),
         d_agebirth1_lab = if_else(d_agebirth1_lab == "Non-parous", NA, d_agebirth1_lab),
         d_dmode = factor(d_dmode, levels = c("SD", "I"))
         ) |> 
  select(any_of(explanatory_vars)
         ) |> 
    tbl_summary(
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                all_categorical() ~ "{n}"
                ),
              digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,,
              type = list(d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "categorical",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "categorical",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "categorical"),
              missing = "no"
    ) |>
    modify_table_body(
      ~ filter(.x, stat_0 != 0 | is.na(stat_0))
    )

# Summary of mammographic
table_summary_md <- df_compl_case |>
  mutate(d_bmi_entry_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_entry_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+"),
        d_bmi_20_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_20_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+") 
              ) |>
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
   mutate(d_bf_dur_lab = if_else(d_bf_dur_lab == "Missing", NA, d_bf_dur_lab),
         d_age_menopause_lab = if_else(d_age_menopause_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_age_menopause_lab),
         d_R1hrtstatus_lab = if_else(d_R1hrtstatus_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_R1hrtstatus_lab),
         d_agebirth1_lab = if_else(d_agebirth1_lab == "Non-parous", NA, d_agebirth1_lab),
         d_dmode = factor(d_dmode, levels = c("SD", "I"))
         ) |> 
  select(any_of(explanatory_vars), d_md
         ) |> 
    tbl_custom_summary(
              statistic = list(
                everything() ~ "{mean} ({sd})"
                ),
              stat_fns  = list(
                everything() ~ function(data, full_data, variable, by, type, ...){
                  dplyr::summarize(data, mean = mean(d_md),
                           sd = sd(d_md))
                }
              ),
              digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,,
              type = list(d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "categorical",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "categorical",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "categorical"),
              missing = "no"
    ) |>
    modify_table_body(
      ~ filter(.x, stat_0 != 0 | is.na(stat_0))
    )


# Unadjusted:
table_unadjusted <- df_compl_case |> 
  filter(d_md_avail == 1
  ) |> 
  mutate(d_bf_dur_lab = if_else(d_bf_dur_lab == "Missing", NA, d_bf_dur_lab),
         d_age_menopause_lab = if_else(d_age_menopause_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_age_menopause_lab),
         d_R1hrtstatus_lab = if_else(d_R1hrtstatus_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_R1hrtstatus_lab),
         d_agebirth1_lab = if_else(d_agebirth1_lab == "Non-parous", NA, d_agebirth1_lab),
         d_dmode = factor(d_dmode, levels = c("SD", "I"))
         ) |> 
  select(d_md, any_of(explanatory_vars)
         ) |> 
  tbl_uvregression(
    method = lm,
    y = d_md,
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun,
    estimate_fun = function(x){
      case_when(
        is.na(x) ~ NA,
        TRUE ~ formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 2)
      )
    },
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
    method.args = list(na.action = na.omit),
    hide_n = T
   ) |> 
  # modify_table_body(~ .x |>
  #   mutate(across(c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high), exp))
  # ) |>
  # modify_header(
  #   estimate = "**exp(Beta)**"
  # ) |>
  # add_global_p() |>  # add global p-value
  bold_labels() 


#table_unadjusted


# rf vars for violin plots
explanatory_vars <- c(
  
                  # "d_dmode",
                      "d_age_menarche_lab",
                  "d_ocstatus2_lab",
                  "d_parity_lab",
                  "d_agebirth1_lab",
                  "d_bf_dur_lab",
                  "d_R1menopause_lab3",
                  "d_age_menopause_lab", 
                  "d_R1hrtstatus_lab",
                  "d_bbd_lab",
                  "d_fambrca_lab",
                  "d_bmi_20_lab",
                  "d_bmi_entry_lab",
                  "d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab",
                  "d_R1alcohol_units_lab",
                  "d_R1smokingstatus_lab"
                        
                 # "d_inv_status", 
                 # "d_grade_lab", 
                 # "d_morph4_lab", 
                 # "d_pos_nodes_lab", 
                 # "d_tumour_size_lab", 
                 # "d_er_status_lab", 
                 # "d_pr_status_lab", 
                 # "d_her2_status_lab"
                        
                      )


# Adjusted table
# List to store regression tables
table_list <- list()

# data manipulation to remove redundant levels 

df_temp <- df_compl_case |> 
  mutate(d_bf_dur_lab = if_else(d_bf_dur_lab == "Missing", NA, d_bf_dur_lab),
         d_age_menopause_lab = if_else(d_age_menopause_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_age_menopause_lab),
         d_R1hrtstatus_lab = if_else(d_R1hrtstatus_lab == "Pre-menopausal", NA, d_R1hrtstatus_lab),
         d_agebirth1_lab = if_else(d_agebirth1_lab == "Non-parous", NA, d_agebirth1_lab),
         d_age_mammo = AgeatEntry + d_R1toMD_y,
         d_dmode = factor(d_dmode, levels = c("SD", "I"))
         )


# Loop through each explanatory variable and create a regression table
for (var in explanatory_vars) {
  # Run the regression model adjusted for age
  model <- lm(as.formula(paste("d_md ~", var, "+ d_age_mammo")), data = df_temp, na.action = na.omit)

  # Create the regression table and store it in the list
  table_list[[var]] <- tbl_regression(
    model,
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun,
    estimate_fun = function(x){
      case_when(
        is.na(x) ~ NA,
        TRUE ~ formatC(x, format = "f", digits = 2)
      )
    },
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
  ) %>%
  # modify_table_body(~ .x |>
  #   mutate(across(c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high), exp))
  # ) |>
  # modify_header(
  #   estimate = "**exp(Beta)**"
  # ) |>
    # add_global_p(
    # ) |> 
    #add_n() |> # checked with unadjusted and n is the same so no need here
    remove_row_type(variables = "d_age_mammo", type = "all")  # Remove the age covariate from the table
}

# Stack all the regression tables into one
table_adjusted <- tbl_stack(table_list)

# View the final stacked table
table_adjusted

# Merge the tables

md_desc_table <- tbl_merge(list(table_summary, table_summary_md, table_unadjusted, table_adjusted),
                           tab_spanner = c(" ", "**Density**", "**Unadjusted**", "**Adjusted for age at mammogram**"
                                           )
                         )
                         
# Changing variable names to make sense
tab_labels <- c(
  # "d_dmode" = "Mode of detection",
  "d_age_menarche_lab" = "Age at menarche",
  "d_ocstatus2_lab" = "Oral contraception status",
  "d_parity_lab" = "Parity",
  "d_agebirth1_lab" = "Age at first birth",
  "d_bf_dur_lab" = "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
  "d_R1menopause_lab3" = "Menopausal status",
  "d_age_menopause_lab" = "Age at menopause",
  "d_R1hrtstatus_lab" = "MHT status",
  "d_bbd_lab" = "Benign breast disease",
  "d_fambrca_lab" = "Family history of breast cancer",
  "d_bmi_20_lab" = "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
  "d_bmi_entry_lab" = "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
  "d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab" = "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
  "d_R1alcohol_units_lab" = "Alcohol units per week",
  "d_R1smokingstatus_lab" = "Smoking status"
  # "d_inv_status" = "Invasive status",
  # "d_grade_lab" = "Grade",
  # "d_morph4_lab" = "Morphology",
  # "d_pos_nodes_lab" = "Node status",
  # "d_tumour_size_lab" = "Tumour size (mm)",
  # "d_er_status_lab" = "ER status",
  # "d_pr_status_lab" = "PR status",
  # "d_her2_status_lab" = "HER2 status"
)

for(i in 1:length(md_desc_table$table_body$label)){
  
  if(md_desc_table$table_body$label[[i]] %in% names(tab_labels)){
    
    md_desc_table$table_body$label[[i]] <- unname(tab_labels[which(names(tab_labels) == md_desc_table$table_body$label[[i]])])
    
  }
  
}

# Filter unneeded rows out
md_desc_table <- md_desc_table |>
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x |>
      filter(stat_0_1 != "0" | is.na(stat_0_1)) |>
      filter(stat_0_2 != "NA (NA)" | is.na(stat_0_2)) |>
      filter(variable != "d_md")
  )

# Manually changing the labels of levels in the table
md_desc_table$table_body$label[md_desc_table$table_body$label == "Mixed: ductal and other"] <- "Mixed"

md_desc_table$table_body$label[grepl(md_desc_table$table_body$label, pattern = "months")] <- gsub(" months", "", md_desc_table$table_body$label[grepl(md_desc_table$table_body$label, pattern = "months")])

md_desc_table$table_body$label[md_desc_table$table_body$label == "I"] <- "Interval"
md_desc_table$table_body$label[md_desc_table$table_body$label == "SD"] <- "Screen-Detected"

md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_bbd_labYes"] <- "Ever"
md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_bbd_labNo"] <- "Never"


md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_ocstatus2_labNo"] <- "Never"
md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_ocstatus2_labYes"] <- "Ever"

md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_inv_status1"] <- "Invasive"
md_desc_table$table_body$label[(md_desc_table$table_body$term_3) == "d_inv_status0"] <- "DCIS"





md_desc_table

wb <- wb$add_worksheet("Supplementary_Table_3")
wb <- wb_add_flextable(wb, "Supplementary_Table_3", as_flex_table(md_desc_table))

```


### Supplementary Table 4

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

# summary Logistic Regression of Model 1  -----------------------------------------

# view existing output
#model2

# remove columns with total and interval N - not simple with gtsummary, trying from scratch without adding the columns


# Create clean version of logistic output, without Ns
model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

# tidy up output
model1 <- tbl_regression(model, 
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>% 
  #add_global_p() %>% 
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p() |> 
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  ) |>
  bold_labels() 
  

#model2

# summary Logistic Regression of Model 2  -----------------------------------------

 model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))


# tidy up output
model2 <- tbl_regression(model, 
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_md_qrt ~ "Mammographic density (quartiles)"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>% 
  #add_global_p() %>% 
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag, d_MDtoBC_lab), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p()|> 
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  )


# summary Logistic Regression of Model 3  -----------------------------------------

model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

# tidy up output
model3 <- tbl_regression(model,
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_inv_status ~ "Invasive status",
                          d_grade_tr ~ "Grade",
                          d_morph4_tr_lab ~ "Morphology type",
                          d_pos_nodes_tr_lab ~ "Node status",
                          d_tmsize_tr_lab ~ "Tumour size (mm)",
                          d_er_tr_lab ~ "ER status",
                          d_pr_tr_lab ~ "PR status",
                          d_her2_tr_lab ~ "HER2 status"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>%
  #add_global_p() %>%
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p()|>
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  )


# summary Logistic Regression of Model 4  -----------------------------------------

model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab 
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

# tidy up output
model4 <- tbl_regression(model, 
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_md_qrt ~ "Mammographic density (quartiles)",
                          d_inv_status ~ "Invasive status",
                          d_grade_tr ~ "Grade",
                          d_morph4_tr_lab ~ "Morphology type",
                          d_pos_nodes_tr_lab ~ "Node status",
                          d_tmsize_tr_lab ~ "Tumour size (mm)",
                          d_er_tr_lab ~ "ER status",
                          d_pr_tr_lab ~ "PR status",
                          d_her2_tr_lab ~ "HER2 status"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>% 
  #add_global_p() %>% 
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag, d_MDtoBC_lab), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p()|> 
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  )


# Create descriptives by mode of detection ------------------------------------
# select(d_dmode_n, d_R1alcohol_units_lab, d_R1smokingstatus_lab, d_bmi_entry_lab,  d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab, d_bbd_lab, d_fambrca_lab, d_age_menarche_lab, d_ocstatus_lab, d_R1menopause_lab3, d_age_meno_tr_lab, d_R1hrt_sttyp_tr_lab, d_parity_tr_lab, d_agebirth1_tr_lab)

# note: need to rename the non-trick variables according to their trick name to align with the model, which can then allow table merge. 

# include missing 
# create df
  
descr_tab2_df <- df  %>%
  select(d_dmode, all_of(all_expl_variables), all_of(tumour_char), diagage, d_R1toBC_y, d_md_qrt
         ) %>% 
  mutate(d_bmi_entry_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_entry_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+"),
        d_bmi_20_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_20_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+") 
              ) %>% 
  mutate(d_age_meno_tr_lab = d_age_menopause_lab,
         d_R1hrt_tr_lab = d_R1hrtstatus_lab,
         d_agebirth1_tr_lab = d_agebirth1_lab,
         d_bf_dur_tr_lab = d_bf_dur_lab
         ) %>% 
  select(-d_age_menopause_lab, -d_R1hrtstatus_lab, -d_agebirth1_lab, -d_bf_dur_lab, -diagage, -d_R1toBC_y)  
  
  

# glimpse(descr_model2)
# str(test)

# create gs summary table
descr_tab2 <- descr_tab2_df %>% 
  mutate(d_dmode = if_else(d_dmode == "I", "Interval", "Screen-Detected")) |>
  select(d_dmode,
         d_age_menarche_lab,
         d_ocstatus2_lab,
         d_parity_lab,
         d_agebirth1_tr_lab,
         d_bf_dur_tr_lab,
         d_R1menopause_lab3,
         d_age_meno_tr_lab,
         d_R1hrt_tr_lab,
         d_bbd_lab,
         d_fambrca_lab,
         d_bmi_entry_lab,
         d_bmi_20_lab,
         d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab,
         d_R1alcohol_units_lab, 
         d_R1smokingstatus_lab,
         d_md_qrt,
         d_inv_status, 
         d_grade_tr = d_grade_lab, 
         d_morph4_tr_lab = d_morph4_lab, 
         d_pos_nodes_tr_lab = d_pos_nodes_lab, 
         d_tmsize_tr_lab = d_tumour_size_lab, 
         d_er_tr_lab = d_er_status_lab, 
         d_pr_tr_lab = d_pr_status_lab, 
         d_her2_tr_lab = d_her2_status_lab) %>% 
  tbl_summary(by = d_dmode,
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"
                ),
              digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,
              label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_md_qrt ~ "Mammographic density (quartiles)",
                          d_inv_status ~ "Invasive status",
                          d_grade_tr ~ "Grade",
                          d_morph4_tr_lab ~ "Morphology type",
                          d_pos_nodes_tr_lab ~ "Node status",
                          d_tmsize_tr_lab ~ "Tumour size (mm)",
                          d_er_tr_lab ~ "ER status",
                          d_pr_tr_lab ~ "PR status",
                          d_her2_tr_lab ~ "HER2 status"
                ),
              type = list(d_bbd_lab ~ "categorical",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "categorical")
              )

#descr_model2
  
# merge with analysis output -------------------------------------------------


table2 <- tbl_merge(
  tbls = list(descr_tab2, model1, model2, model3, model4),
  tab_spanner = c("**Distribution by detection mode**", "**Model 1**", "**Model 2**", "**Model 3**", "**Model 4**")
   ) 

#show_header_names(table2)

table2 <- table2 %>% 
  modify_footnote(
    estimate_2 ~ "Model 1: Age at menarche, Menopause, Age at menopause, MHT status, Oral contraceptive use, Parity, Age at first birth, Breast feeding duration (mths), Benign breast disease, Family history of breast cancer, BMI at recruitment (kg/m²), BMI at age 20 (kg/m²), Physical activity (MET h/wk), Alcohol units per week, Smoking status, Age at Diagnosis, Time from Recruitment to BC diagnosis, Year of diagnosis",
    estimate_3 ~ "Model 2: Age at menarche, Menopause, Age at menopause, MHT status, Oral contraceptive use, Parity, Age at first birth, Breast feeding duration (mths), Benign breast disease, Family history of breast cancer, BMI at recruitment (kg/m²), BMI at age 20 (kg/m²), Physical activity (MET h/wk), Alcohol units per week, Smoking status, Age at diagnosis, Time from recruitment to BC diagnosis, Year of diagnosis, Percent mammographic density (quartiles), Time from mammographic density measurement to BRCA diagnosis",
    estimate_4 ~ "Model 3: Age at menarche, Menopause, Age at menopause, MHT status, Oral contraceptive use, Parity, Age at first birth, Breast feeding duration (mths), Benign breast disease, Family history of breast cancer, BMI at recruitment (kg/m²), BMI at age 20 (kg/m²), Physical activity (MET h/wk), Alcohol units per week, Smoking status, Age at diagnosis, Time from recruitment to BC diagnosis, Year of diagnosis, Invasive status, Morphology, Node status, Tumour size, ER status, PR status, HER2 status",
    estimate_5 ~ "Model 4: Age at menarche, Menopause, Age at menopause, MHT status, Oral contraceptive use, Parity, Age at first birth, Breast feeding duration (mths), Benign breast disease, Family history of breast cancer, BMI at recruitment (kg/m²), BMI at age 20 (kg/m²), Physical activity (MET h/wk), Alcohol units per week, Smoking status, Age at diagnosis, Time from recruitment to BC diagnosis, Year of diagnosis, Percent mammographic density (quartiles), Time from mammographic density measurement to BRCA diagnosis, Invasive status, Morphology, Node status, Tumour size, ER status, PR status, HER2 status"
  )

# Manually changing labels for the levels
table2$table_body$label[grepl(" months", table2$table_body$label)] <- gsub(" months", "", table2$table_body$label[grepl(" months", table2$table_body$label)])

table2$table_body$label[43] <- "Never"
table2$table_body$label[44] <- "Ever"

table2$table_body$label[7] <- "Never"
table2$table_body$label[8] <- "Ever"

table2$table_body$label[82] <- "DCIS"
table2$table_body$label[83] <- "Invasive"
table2$table_body$label[table2$table_body$label == "Mixed: ductal and other"] <- "Mixed"

table2$table_body$label[table2$table_body$term_3 == "d_md_qrt1"] <- "1 (<11.45%)"
table2$table_body$label[table2$table_body$term_3 == "d_md_qrt2"] <- "2 (11.45-22.00%)"
table2$table_body$label[table2$table_body$term_3 == "d_md_qrt3"] <- "3 (22.00-26.70%)"
table2$table_body$label[table2$table_body$term_3 == "d_md_qrt4"] <- "4 (>36.70%)"

table2

table2_df <- as_tibble(table2)

write_xlsx(table2_df, path = "../outputs/results.xlsx")


wb <- wb$add_worksheet("Supplementary_Table_4")
wb <- wb_add_flextable(wb, "Supplementary_Table_4", as_flex_table(table2))

wb$save("../outputs/figures/supplement/supplementary_tables.xlsx")

```


## Miscellaneous

### Associations of BBD with TC and MOD

WARNINGS?
```{r, warning = F, results = "asis"}

# Try and find associations with tumour characteristics


model <- df |>
  glm(formula = as.formula(paste0("d_bbd_lab ~", paste0(tumour_char_tr,collapse = "+"))), family = "binomial")


tbl_regression(x = model,
                 exponentiate = T) |>
  add_global_p() |>
  print()

for(i in 1:3){
  
  mean <- mean(df$d_bbd_lab[df$d_grade_lab == i]=="Yes")
  sd <- sd(df$d_bbd_lab[df$d_grade_lab == i]=="Yes")
  
  print(paste0(mean, " (", mean - 1.96*sd, ", ", mean + 1.96*sd, ")"))
  
}

# Testing BBD History association with MOD with/without removing Grade

# Full model
model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab 
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

tbl_regression(x = model, exponentiate = T) |>
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$variable == "d_bbd_lab")
  )

# Model without TC
model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

tbl_regression(x = model, exponentiate = T) |>
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$variable == "d_bbd_lab")
  )

# Including Grade
model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_grade_tr,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

tbl_regression(x = model, exponentiate = T) |>
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$variable == "d_bbd_lab")
  )



```
### Associations of Family History of BC with TC and MOD

```{r, warning = F, results = "asis"}

# Try and find associations with tumour characteristics


model <- df |>
  glm(formula = as.formula(paste0("d_fambrca_lab ~", paste0(tumour_char_tr,collapse = "+"))), family = "binomial")


tbl_regression(x = model,
                 exponentiate = T) |>
  print()

# Testing BBD History association with MOD with/without removing Grade

# Full model
model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab 
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

tbl_regression(x = model, exponentiate = T) |>
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$variable == "d_fambrca_lab")
  )

# Model without TC
model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

tbl_regression(x = model, exponentiate = T) |>
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$variable == "d_fambrca_lab")
  )

# Adding grade
model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_grade_tr,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

tbl_regression(x = model, exponentiate = T) |>
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$variable == "d_fambrca_lab")
  )


```



### Counting individuals by ordering of events in MOD

```{r}
#| echo: false

df |>
  mutate(
    
    MOD_order = case_when(
      d_dmode == "I" & is.na(d_MDtoBC_y) ~ "Interval: no MD",
      d_dmode == "I" & d_R1toMD_y <= 0 ~ "Interval: MD -> R1",
      d_dmode == "I" & d_R1toMD_y > 0 ~ "Interval: R1 -> MD",
      d_dmode == "SD" & is.na(d_MDtoBC_y) ~ "Screen-Detected: no MD",
      d_dmode == "SD" & d_R1toMD_y <= 0 ~ "Screen-Detected: MD -> R1",
      d_dmode == "SD" & d_R1toMD_y > 0 & d_MDtoBC_y == 0 ~ "Screen-Detected: R1 -> MD == BC",
      d_dmode == "SD" & d_R1toMD_y > 0 & d_MDtoBC_y > 0.25 ~ "Screen-Detected: R1 -> MD -> BC",
      d_dmode == "SD" & d_R1toMD_y > 0 & d_MDtoBC_y > 0 ~ "Screen-Detected: R1 -> MD == BC",
      d_dmode == "SD" & d_R1toMD_y > 0 & d_MDtoBC_y < 0 ~ "Screen-Detected: R1 -> MD == BC",
      TRUE ~ "NA"
    )
    
  ) |>
  xtabs(formula = ~ MOD_order)

```

### Summary of time differences

```{r}
#| echo: false

for(mod in unique(df$d_dmode)){
  
  label <- if_else(mod == "I", "Interval", "Screen-Detected")
  
  cat("Summary of time from R1 to breast cancer for", label, "cancers\n")
  with(df |> filter(d_dmode == mod), print(summary(d_R1toBC_y)))
  cat("\n")
  
  cat("Summary of time from R1 to mammogram for", label, "cancers\n")
  with(df |> filter(d_dmode == mod), print(summary(d_R1toMD_y)))
  cat("\n")

  cat("Summary of time from mammogram to breast cancer for", label, "cancers\n")
  with(df |> filter(d_dmode == mod), print(summary(d_MDtoBC_y)))
  cat("\n")

  
  
}

```

### Statistics for paper
```{r}
#| echo: false

# Summary of density for IBC vs SDBC
cat("Summary of mammographic density for IBC\n")
summary(df$d_md[df$d_dmode == "I"], na.rm = T)


cat("Summary of mammographic density for SDBC\n")
summary(df$d_md[df$d_dmode == "SD"], na.rm = T)

# Percentage of missing densities
cat("Percentage of missing densities\n")
summary(1-df$d_md_avail)


```

### Choice of transform for the mammographic density
```{r}

# Normal (no transform)
model <- df %>%
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
  lm(formula = d_md ~ d_dmode + d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab 
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab)

shapiro.test(model$residuals)
qqnorm(model$residuals)
qqline(model$residuals)

# Log transform
model <- df %>%
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
  lm(formula = log(d_md) ~ d_dmode +  d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab 
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab)

shapiro.test(model$residuals)
qqnorm(model$residuals)
qqline(model$residuals)

# Logistic transform
model <- df %>%
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
  lm(formula = logit(d_md/100) ~ d_dmode + d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab 
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab)

shapiro.test(model$residuals)
qqnorm(model$residuals)
qqline(model$residuals)


# Square root transform
model <- df %>%
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
  lm(formula = sqrt(d_md) ~ d_dmode + d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab 
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab)

shapiro.test(model$residuals)
qqnorm(model$residuals)
qqline(model$residuals)



```

### Fitting a model to see if any variables are associated with no mammographic density measured
```{r}

model <- glm(data = df, formula = d_md_avail ~ d_dmode + d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab 
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab,
      family = binomial)

summary(model)

```

### Complete-case analysis
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

# summary Logistic Regression of Model 1  -----------------------------------------

# view existing output
#model2

# remove columns with total and interval N - not simple with gtsummary, trying from scratch without adding the columns


# Create clean version of logistic output, without Ns
model <- df %>%
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

# tidy up output
model1 <- tbl_regression(model, 
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>% 
  #add_global_p() %>% 
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p() |> 
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  ) |>
  bold_labels() 
  

#model2

# summary Logistic Regression of Model 2  -----------------------------------------

 model <- df %>%
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))


# tidy up output
model2 <- tbl_regression(model, 
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_md_qrt ~ "Mammographic density (quartiles)"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>% 
  #add_global_p() %>% 
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag, d_MDtoBC_lab), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p()|> 
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  )


# summary Logistic Regression of Model 3  -----------------------------------------

model <- df %>%
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

# tidy up output
model3 <- tbl_regression(model,
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_inv_status ~ "Invasive status",
                          d_grade_tr ~ "Grade",
                          d_morph4_tr_lab ~ "Morphology type",
                          d_pos_nodes_tr_lab ~ "Node status",
                          d_tmsize_tr_lab ~ "Tumour size (mm)",
                          d_er_tr_lab ~ "ER status",
                          d_pr_tr_lab ~ "PR status",
                          d_her2_tr_lab ~ "HER2 status"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>%
  #add_global_p() %>%
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p()|>
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  )


# summary Logistic Regression of Model 4  -----------------------------------------

model <- df %>%
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab 
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

# tidy up output
model4 <- tbl_regression(model, 
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_md_qrt ~ "Mammographic density (quartiles)",
                          d_inv_status ~ "Invasive status",
                          d_grade_tr ~ "Grade",
                          d_morph4_tr_lab ~ "Morphology type",
                          d_pos_nodes_tr_lab ~ "Node status",
                          d_tmsize_tr_lab ~ "Tumour size (mm)",
                          d_er_tr_lab ~ "ER status",
                          d_pr_tr_lab ~ "PR status",
                          d_her2_tr_lab ~ "HER2 status"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>% 
  #add_global_p() %>% 
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag, d_MDtoBC_lab), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p()|> 
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  )


# Create descriptives by mode of detection ------------------------------------
# select(d_dmode_n, d_R1alcohol_units_lab, d_R1smokingstatus_lab, d_bmi_entry_lab,  d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab, d_bbd_lab, d_fambrca_lab, d_age_menarche_lab, d_ocstatus_lab, d_R1menopause_lab3, d_age_meno_tr_lab, d_R1hrt_sttyp_tr_lab, d_parity_tr_lab, d_agebirth1_tr_lab)

# note: need to rename the non-trick variables according to their trick name to align with the model, which can then allow table merge. 

# include missing 
# create df
  
descr_tab2_df <- df  %>%
  filter(d_md_avail == 1) |>
  select(d_dmode, all_of(all_expl_variables), all_of(tumour_char), diagage, d_R1toBC_y, d_md_qrt
         ) %>% 
  mutate(d_bmi_entry_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_entry_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+"),
        d_bmi_20_lab = fct_relevel(d_bmi_20_lab, "<18.5", "18.5-25", "25-30", "30+") 
              ) %>% 
  mutate(d_age_meno_tr_lab = d_age_menopause_lab,
         d_R1hrt_tr_lab = d_R1hrtstatus_lab,
         d_agebirth1_tr_lab = d_agebirth1_lab,
         d_bf_dur_tr_lab = d_bf_dur_lab
         ) %>% 
  select(-d_age_menopause_lab, -d_R1hrtstatus_lab, -d_agebirth1_lab, -d_bf_dur_lab, -diagage, -d_R1toBC_y)  
  
  

# glimpse(descr_model2)
# str(test)

# create gs summary table
descr_tab2 <- descr_tab2_df %>%
  mutate(d_dmode = if_else(d_dmode == "I", "Interval", "Screen-Detected")) |>
  select(d_dmode,
         d_age_menarche_lab,
         d_ocstatus2_lab,
         d_parity_lab,
         d_agebirth1_tr_lab,
         d_bf_dur_tr_lab,
         d_R1menopause_lab3,
         d_age_meno_tr_lab,
         d_R1hrt_tr_lab,
         d_bbd_lab,
         d_fambrca_lab,
         d_bmi_entry_lab,
         d_bmi_20_lab,
         d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab,
         d_R1alcohol_units_lab, 
         d_R1smokingstatus_lab,
         d_md_qrt,
         d_inv_status, 
         d_grade_tr = d_grade_lab, 
         d_morph4_tr_lab = d_morph4_lab, 
         d_pos_nodes_tr_lab = d_pos_nodes_lab, 
         d_tmsize_tr_lab = d_tumour_size_lab, 
         d_er_tr_lab = d_er_status_lab, 
         d_pr_tr_lab = d_pr_status_lab, 
         d_her2_tr_lab = d_her2_status_lab) %>% 
  tbl_summary(by = d_dmode,
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"
                ),
              digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,
              label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_md_qrt ~ "Mammographic density (quartiles)",
                          d_inv_status ~ "Invasive status",
                          d_grade_tr ~ "Grade",
                          d_morph4_tr_lab ~ "Morphology type",
                          d_pos_nodes_tr_lab ~ "Node status",
                          d_tmsize_tr_lab ~ "Tumour size (mm)",
                          d_er_tr_lab ~ "ER status",
                          d_pr_tr_lab ~ "PR status",
                          d_her2_tr_lab ~ "HER2 status"
                ),
              type = list(d_bbd_lab ~ "categorical",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "categorical")
              )

#descr_model2
  
# merge with analysis output -------------------------------------------------


table2 <- tbl_merge(
  tbls = list(descr_tab2, model1, model2, model3, model4),
  tab_spanner = c("**Distribution by detection mode**", "**Model 1**", "**Model 2**", "**Model 3**", "**Model 4**")
   ) 

#show_header_names(table2)

table2 <- table2 %>% 
  modify_footnote(
    estimate_2 ~ "Model 1: Age at menarche, Menopause, Age at menopause, MHT status, Oral contraceptive use, Parity, Age at first birth, Breast feeding duration (mths), Benign breast disease, Family history of breast cancer, BMI at recruitment (kg/m²), BMI at age 20 (kg/m²), Physical activity (MET h/wk), Alcohol units per week, Smoking status, Age at Diagnosis, Time from Recruitment to BC diagnosis, Year of diagnosis",
    estimate_3 ~ "Model 2: Age at menarche, Menopause, Age at menopause, MHT status, Oral contraceptive use, Parity, Age at first birth, Breast feeding duration (mths), Benign breast disease, Family history of breast cancer, BMI at recruitment (kg/m²), BMI at age 20 (kg/m²), Physical activity (MET h/wk), Alcohol units per week, Smoking status, Age at diagnosis, Time from recruitment to BC diagnosis, Year of diagnosis, Percent mammographic density (quartiles), Time from mammographic density measurement to BRCA diagnosis",
    estimate_4 ~ "Model 3: Age at menarche, Menopause, Age at menopause, MHT status, Oral contraceptive use, Parity, Age at first birth, Breast feeding duration (mths), Benign breast disease, Family history of breast cancer, BMI at recruitment (kg/m²), BMI at age 20 (kg/m²), Physical activity (MET h/wk), Alcohol units per week, Smoking status, Age at diagnosis, Time from recruitment to BC diagnosis, Year of diagnosis, Invasive status, Morphology, Node status, Tumour size, ER status, PR status, HER2 status",
    estimate_5 ~ "Model 4: Age at menarche, Menopause, Age at menopause, MHT status, Oral contraceptive use, Parity, Age at first birth, Breast feeding duration (mths), Benign breast disease, Family history of breast cancer, BMI at recruitment (kg/m²), BMI at age 20 (kg/m²), Physical activity (MET h/wk), Alcohol units per week, Smoking status, Age at diagnosis, Time from recruitment to BC diagnosis, Year of diagnosis, Percent mammographic density (quartiles), Time from mammographic density measurement to BRCA diagnosis, Invasive status, Morphology, Node status, Tumour size, ER status, PR status, HER2 status"
  )

# Manually changing labels for the levels
table2$table_body$label[grepl(" months", table2$table_body$label)] <- gsub(" months", "", table2$table_body$label[grepl(" months", table2$table_body$label)])

table2$table_body$label[43] <- "Never"
table2$table_body$label[44] <- "Ever"

table2$table_body$label[7] <- "Never"
table2$table_body$label[8] <- "Ever"

table2$table_body$label[82] <- "DCIS"
table2$table_body$label[83] <- "Invasive"
table2$table_body$label[table2$table_body$label == "Mixed: ductal and other"] <- "Mixed"

table2$table_body$label[table2$table_body$term_3 == "d_md_qrt1"] <- "1 (<11.45%)"
table2$table_body$label[table2$table_body$term_3 == "d_md_qrt2"] <- "2 (11.45-22.00%)"
table2$table_body$label[table2$table_body$term_3 == "d_md_qrt3"] <- "3 (22.00-26.70%)"
table2$table_body$label[table2$table_body$term_3 == "d_md_qrt4"] <- "4 (>36.70%)"

table2

table2_df <- as_tibble(table2)

write_xlsx(table2_df, path = "../outputs/cc_results.xlsx")

```

### Testing for effect of SES on BMI association
```{r}

#| echo: false
#| warning: false

# summary Logistic Regression of Model 1  -----------------------------------------

# view existing output
#model2

# Read in SES data
data_ses <- read.csv("//dge/DGE/AETEPID/SHARED/USERS/ZRichards/ForMartina_Nov25_GS_carstairs2001.csv")

# remove columns with total and interval N - not simple with gtsummary, trying from scratch without adding the columns
df_ses <- df |>
  merge(data_ses, by.x = "tcode", by.y = "TCode", all.x = T) |>
  mutate(missing_ses = if_else(is.na(carstairs), 1, 0)) |>
  mutate(carstairs = replace_values(carstairs, NA ~ 0))

# Create clean version of logistic output, without Ns
model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

# tidy up output
model1 <- tbl_regression(model, 
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>% 
  #add_global_p() %>% 
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p() |> 
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  ) |>
  bold_labels() 
  

#model2

# summary Logistic Regression of Model 2  -----------------------------------------

 model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))


# tidy up output
model2 <- tbl_regression(model, 
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_md_qrt ~ "Mammographic density (quartiles)"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>% 
  #add_global_p() %>% 
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag, d_MDtoBC_lab), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p()|> 
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  )


# summary Logistic Regression of Model 3  -----------------------------------------

model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

# tidy up output
model3 <- tbl_regression(model,
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_inv_status ~ "Invasive status",
                          d_grade_tr ~ "Grade",
                          d_morph4_tr_lab ~ "Morphology type",
                          d_pos_nodes_tr_lab ~ "Node status",
                          d_tmsize_tr_lab ~ "Tumour size (mm)",
                          d_er_tr_lab ~ "ER status",
                          d_pr_tr_lab ~ "PR status",
                          d_her2_tr_lab ~ "HER2 status"
                         ),
    pvalue_fun = custom_pvalue_fun
    # pvalue_fun = ~ .x,
    # estimate_fun = ~ .x
                         ) %>%
  #add_global_p() %>%
  remove_row_type(variables = c(diagage, d_R1toBC_y, yeardiag), # remove covariates
                  type = "all") %>%
  # add_global_p()|>
  # remove Missing levels from regression output
  modify_table_body(
    ~ .x %>%
      dplyr::filter(!grepl("Missing", .data$label, ignore.case = TRUE))  # Filter 'missing' levels
  )


# summary Logistic Regression of Model 4  -----------------------------------------

model <- df %>%
  glm(formula = d_dmode_n ~ d_R1menopause_lab3 + d_age_meno_tr_lab
      + d_R1hrt_tr_lab
      + d_parity_lab + d_agebirth1_tr_lab + d_age_menarche_lab + d_ocstatus2_lab
      + d_bbd_lab + d_fambrca_lab
      + d_R1alcohol_units_lab + d_R1smokingstatus_lab
      + d_bmi_entry_lab + d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab + d_bmi_20_lab + d_bf_dur_tr_lab
      + diagage + d_R1toBC_y + yeardiag
      + d_md_qrt + d_MDtoBC_lab
      + d_inv_status + d_grade_tr + d_morph4_tr_lab + d_pos_nodes_tr_lab 
      + d_tmsize_tr_lab + d_er_tr_lab + d_pr_tr_lab + d_her2_tr_lab,
            family = binomial(link = "logit"))

# tidy up output
model4 <- tbl_regression(model, 
                         exponentiate = TRUE,
                         label = list(
                          d_R1alcohol_units_lab ~ "Alcohol units per week",
                          d_R1smokingstatus_lab ~ "Smoking status",
                          d_bmi_entry_lab ~ "BMI at recruitment (kg/m²)",
                          d_R1physmet_leis_who_lab ~ "Physical activity (MET h/wk)",
                          d_bbd_lab ~ "Benign breast disease",
                          d_fambrca_lab ~ "Family history of breast cancer",
                          d_age_menarche_lab ~ "Age at menarche",
                          d_ocstatus2_lab ~ "Oral contraceptive use",
                          d_R1menopause_lab3 ~ "Menopausal status",
                          d_age_meno_tr_lab ~ "Age at menopause",
                          d_R1hrt_tr_lab ~ "MHT status",
                          d_parity_lab ~ "Parity",
                          d_agebirth1_tr_lab ~ "Age at first birth",
                          d_bmi_20_lab ~ "BMI at age 20 (kg/m²)",
                          d_bf_dur_tr_lab ~ "Breastfeeding duration (mths)",
                          d_md_qrt ~ "Mammographic density (quartiles)",
                          d_inv_status ~ "Invasive status",
                          d_grade_tr ~ "Grade",
                          d_morph4_tr_lab ~ "Morphology type",
                          d_pos_nodes_tr_lab ~ "Node status",
```
